allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix XSS vulnerabilities and improve web UI security

- Replace inline onclick handlers with data attributes and event delegation
- Escape all server error messages to prevent XSS attacks
- Add offline/online status indicator in header when WebSocket disconnects
- Update version display to 1.1.0

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
